title: Floral Aditions
description: Hello! This is my first Minecraft mod, Enjoy! :D
body:
Floral Town Decorations mod 1.0.0

This mod seeks to add new decoration blocks to place all throughout your Minecraft worlds! Currently it has been made available only for Minecraft java 1.20 to 1.20.1 for Fabric, but in the future, I may make it also for: forge and Minecraft Bedrock.
Currently the only new blocks you can craft are Planters! These can make your Minecraft builds have more personality and beauty! They can be made with all small flowers, for the exception of torch flowers, this is because the software I used to make the mod, MCreator, doesn't offer the torch flower as an option when putting items in your recipes. Another thing to note: the planter also requires a 3 item-base in the crafting grid of birch logs, put the flower of choice in the center, and then a singular vine on the left or right of that and presto! You have made your very own planter! (If you craft this item with a wither rose the leaves will match the color of the wither rose stem.)

Note: I forgot to make the Starbound Hoe craftable, this will be fixed in the future.

Enjoy the mod! And please remember to drink water :D
